preflop.rationale: KQo is marginal vs AJo. Call to see flop cheaply. Bot will check behind.

flop.rationale: Top pair K with Q kicker. Bot has ace-high with underpair. Call to keep pot controlled. Bot will check behind.

turn.rationale: Board unchanged. Bot checks behind. See river cheap.

river.rationale: Bot may bet small. Call with top pair. Bot could have ace-high.

outcome_by_sequence.preflop:call,flop:call,turn:check,river:: Showdown: player wins with pair of Kings.
outcome_by_sequence.preflop:raise,flop:raise,turn:raise,rive: Showdown: player wins with pair of Kings, bot calls all streets.
outcome_by_sequence.preflop:fold: Player folds preflop, loses small blind.
